scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ship-council/web && npm run typecheck
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @ship-council/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @ship-council/agents && npm run typecheck --workspace @ship-council/providers && npm run typecheck --workspace @ship-council/orchestration && npm run typecheck --workspace @ship-council/exports && npm run typecheck --workspace @ship-council/web
